title: misandra juncea
intro: Misandra juncea, also known as False Ashok or Indian Ashok, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Misandra juncea include its ability to act as a uterine stimulant and a diuretic, making it useful in treating menstrual disorders and promoting digestion. The health benefits of Misandra juncea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as its ability to aid in weight loss and lower cholesterol levels. Misandra juncea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
